smscollectr 0.0.2
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Parse a single agrometeorological SMS into a long tibble

Source: R/sms.R
dot-parse_agro_sms.Rd

Internal helper. Parses a multi-line agrometeorological SMS message into a tidy long-format tibble with one row per observed variable. Returns a single-row all-NA tibble for any message that fails validation or cannot be parsed.

Usage

.parse_agro_sms(txt)

Arguments

txt

character(1). A single raw SMS string with newline-separated lines.

Value

A tibble::tibble() with columns eg_gh_id, year, month, day, time, eg_el_abbreviation, value, flag. One row per variable (15 rows for a complete message). Returns a single-row all-NA tibble when parsing fails.

Details

The SMS format is:

STATION-NAME
DD-MM-YYYY
Tn= 305
Tx= 438
...
RA= NT

See also

to_station_id(), to_element_id(), parse_sms()
